name: Bistro Moncur Potato & Mussel Salad
recipeIngredient: 500 g Pink eye potatoes, peeled and diced
1 head fennel, trimmed and sliced thinly
30 ml to 40 mL white wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam potatoes until tender.
2. Clean mussels and open by placing them in a large pan with a tight-fitting lid and heating. Remove mussel meat from shells.
3. Make vinaigrette by infusing saffron from the stamens in half a tablespoon of hot water. Rub a bowl with crushed garlic, then add oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste, and the saffron infusion. Mix well.
4. While potatoes are still hot, dress them liberally with the vinaigrette.
5. Assemble the remaining ingredients and toss everything together.
